content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — Paywall offers "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" (App/PaywallView.swift:11), a quid-pro-quo review incentive that may trigger review questions.
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits offering compensation for reviews because it corrupts App Store rating integrity. The paywall promises free Premium in exchange for a 5-star review, which is a textbook incentivized-review violation under 2.3.9. Remove this line and, if a rating prompt is desired, use the SKStoreReviewController/StoreKit review API with no reward attached.
